integration_validation_v2.gap: MT deliverable is to ENUMERATE the full ~100+ CKC command corpus into the action catalog schema cross-checked against manual coverage; only the storage/parity machinery exists. No migration seed, const descriptor array, fixture, or runtime bootstrap populates the corpus, and the sole non-test caller of upsert_command_corpus_entry is the module itself. The parity-report test seeds only 2 rows and asserts total_corpus>=2; nothing proves the 100+ enumeration or the manual cross-check the MT requires.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/backend/handshake_core/src/atelier/command_corpus.rs:33 claims 'enumeration + parity + projection' but ships no command list; grep found no INSERT INTO atelier_command_corpus_entry in migrations/ and no non-test caller of upsert_command_corpus_entry. tests/atelier_command_corpus_tests.rs:597-702 corpus_parity_report only seeds covered+blocked (2 rows), asserts total_corpus>=2 / blocked_count>=1 -- machinery is real on PG but the headline ~100+ enumeration deliverable is absent and unproven.

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Production src/atelier/command_corpus.rs - const builtin_table::ROWS with 140 entries (:2245-2419, one per handshake_invoke_handlers! registration); builtin_command_corpus() derives manual_anchor live from ModelManual; bootstrap_builtin_command_corpus (:2554-2597) projects full corpus into PG (upsert + anchor or BLOCKED sentinel + no_manual_anchor record); runtime bootstrap wired at backend startup (main.rs:128). Proof tests/atelier_command_corpus_tests.rs corpus_full_builtin_enumeration_bootstraps_and_parity_checks_against_manual (:714): >=100 asserted, unique ids, typed params/receipt/errors, PG bootstrap receipt counts, per-descriptor PG re-read fidelity, independent live-ModelManual covered/blocked cross-check, BLOCKED-001 durable records, parity report total>=140, idempotent re-bootstrap with stable entry_id.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-206 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] 100+ Command-Corpus Parity Enumeration (GAP-FILL) -- Enumerate the full ~100+ CKC command corpus into the action catalog schema (id/owner/params/capabilities/receipt/errors/foreground)
cross-checked against manual coverage and marked BLOCKED where no anchor exists.
proof_targets: cargo test --test atelier_command_corpus_tests on managed PostgreSQL; headline: corpus_full_builtin_enumeration_bootstraps_and_parity_checks_against_manual (full 140-command builtin enumeration, PG bootstrap + re-read, live ModelManual parity with derived covered/blocked split)
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC full command/handler corpus (preload + IPC handlers) unrepresented
scope.summary: MT-206 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] 100+ Command-Corpus Parity Enumeration (GAP-FILL) -- Enumerate the full ~100+ CKC command corpus into the action catalog schema (id/owner/params/capabilities/receipt/errors/foreground), cross-checked against manual coverage and marked BLOCKED where no anchor exists.
